content:
🚀 We're Hiring – Technical Recruiters (US & Canada Staffing)

📍 Location: H-52, Sector 63, Noida
 🏢 Company: Tanisha Systems Inc.
 💼 Employment Type: Full-Time
 🏢 Work Mode: Complete Onsite

Are you an experienced Technical Recruiter with expertise in both US and Canada Staffing?

Tanisha Systems Inc. is looking for dynamic and result-oriented professionals to join our growing recruitment team.
🔹 Experience Required: 3–5 Years
 🔹 Expertise Required:
 ✔ US IT Staffing
 ✔ Canada IT Staffing
 ✔ End-to-End Recruitment
 ✔ Sourcing through Job Boards, LinkedIn, and Internal Databases
 ✔ Strong understanding of W2, C2C, 1099, and Canadian hiring models
 ✔ Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills

If you're passionate about talent acquisition and have a proven track record in US & Canada recruitment, we'd love to hear from you!


Aaditi Marol
Nikhil Malik
Rahul 🅓🅔🅥
Kumar R.
Dev Chauhan
Kapil Rana
Chandan Mishra
Amrendra Shukla
